ajuz: ظَلِلْتُ بِهَا أَبْكِي وَأَبْكِي إِلَى الْغَدِ
reason: did not converge within max correction passes

pyarud_detail.last_correction_report: Failed after 3 correction passes. Sadr consistently 1 mora short in taweel (20 actual vs 21 expected). Feet 3-4 have wrong weight pattern: U_U_U instead of UU_U_ (foot 3) and U_UU_ instead of UU_UU_ (foot 4). No combination of case endings, tanwīn, or shadda positions could fix — the consonant skeleton بروضة دعمي فأكناف حائل produces insufficient morae for taweel per pyarud analysis.
